nasb.text: Now there came a day when Elisha passed over to Shunem, where there was a prominent woman, and she persuaded him to eat food. And so it was, as often as he passed by, he turned in there to eat food.

esv.text: One day Elisha went on to Shunem, where a wealthy woman lived, who urged him to eat some food. So whenever he passed that way, he would turn in there to eat food.

cnv.text: 有一天，以利沙經過書念的時候，那裡有一位貴婦堅持留他吃飯；於是以後每逢他從那裡經過，他總進去吃飯。

ccb.text: 一天，以利沙路过书念，那里一位富有的妇人挽留他吃饭。此后以利沙每次路过那里，总到她家里吃饭。
